title: NNGMCE+
description: Lots of QOL improvements as well as biome and dimension modification
body: NotNotGrumm's Minecraft Enhanced. Aiming to make minecraft feel more interesting and new. Includes visual enhancments, all of the performance mods from FabulouslyOptimized, and some shaders. Also has additional biomes in all 3 base game dimensions, and also the aether cause who doesn't love the aether.
